title: LumyREI
description: Integrates Cobblemon recipes (Campfire Pot & Brewing Stand) directly into REI
body:
![LumyREI Banner - Brewing Stand and Campfire Pot Cobblemon REI Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85b700f9c69f2f1bb807dda2fabb301230930d9f.png)
### LumyREI: Cobblemon recipes integrated with REI

**LumyREI** is an add-on designed specifically for **Roughly Enough Items (REI)**. It provides full recipe integration for the new recipes introduced by Cobblemon 1.7+, including the **Cobblemon Campfire Pot** and the **Minecraft Brewing Stand**, directly into the REI interface.

If you are a **Cobblemon player and rely on REI** for recipes, this mod can be pretty useful for you!

---

### Key Features

#### 🔍 Seamless REI Integration
All custom Cobblemon recipes are now fully visible and searchable within the standard REI screen.

#### 🍲 Cobblemon Cooking Recipes
Easily find out which ingredients are needed to create specific meals/items in the **Cobblemon Campfire Pot**.

#### 🧪 Brewing Stand Recipes
Look up the recipes for specialized potions and items using the **Brewing Stand**, with all the required ingredients clearly displayed.

#### ✨ Designed for QoL
LumyREI is focused on making the crafting and progression experience smoother and more intuitive, significantly reducing the time spent checking external wikis or guides.

---

### The Origin of LumyREI

Our modpack, **[COBBLEVERSE](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobbleverse)**, utilizes **REI** as the primary recipe viewer.

With the introduction of new crafting mechanisms in Cobblemon 1.7+, specifically the new **Campfire Pot** and the **Brewing Stand** recipes, we quickly realized the need for a system that would allow our players to conveniently view these new recipes directly within the modpack. This eliminates the need to keep consulting external guides.

Therefore, we developed **LumyREI**: it is our in-house solution to ensure an intuitive crafting experience for all COBBLEVERSE players and the wider community.

---

### Special Thanks

A huge thank you to the **[Cobblemon Team](https://modrinth.com/organization/cobbled-studios)** and **[Shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel)** for their incredible work that makes projects like LumyREI possible.
